news.paragraph: Silver traders are currently weighing long-term industrial demand from the clean energy sector against immediate macro headwinds like rising Treasury yields and geopolitical uncertainty surrounding Iran. While recent headlines show downward pressure on exchange-traded funds, inflation concerns and high-profile bullish sentiment continue to influence price action. Traders should monitor geopolitical developments and inflation data as key near-term catalysts for volatility.
